title: Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies:
Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies!
